subject: May 10th, 2026
fact: The session date is recorded as May 10th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 10th, 2026

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A Mezzaloth lashed out at Daein with its trident but every strike sailed wide.
source_quote: The cruel Yugoloth lashed out at Daein with its trident, driven not by strategy but by sheer malice, yet every strike sailed wide

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth vanished in an instant and reappeared across the battlefield.
source_quote: the creature vanished in an instant and reappeared across the battlefield

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth conjured a suffocating cloud of poisonous yellow-green fog.
source_quote: a suffocating cloud of poisonous yellow-green fog conjured by the Mezzaloth

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's concentration broke under the relentless assault of the poison.
source_quote: Bramgrim, whose concentration finally broke under the relentless assault

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting.
source_quote: summoning a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim attempted to clear the toxic fog with a burst of dispelling magic but the cloud held.
source_quote: attempted to clear the toxic fog with a burst of dispelling magic — but the cloud held

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim managed to heal the battered Owlbear.
source_quote: Bramgrim managed to heal the battered Owlbear

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth.
source_quote: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur maintained his concentration on the invisible Wall of Force.
source_quote: Felkur who quietly bore the greatest burden of all, maintaining his concentration on the invisible Wall of Force

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used a moment's respite to catch his breath and recover his strength.
source_quote: Daein used a moment's respite to catch his breath and recover his strength

subject: Daein
fact: Daein cut the Mezzaloth down before it could escape.
source_quote: Daein was already moving, cutting the creature down before it could escape

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths emerged in the chaos screaming for reinforcements.
source_quote: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths had emerged in the chaos, screaming for reinforcements

subject: Fire Giant
fact: Two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall.
source_quote: two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall

subject: Daein
fact: Daein was attacked by the Fire Giants and every single strike fell short.
source_quote: every single strike falling short in a display so improbable it drew stunned silence from the party

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy.
source_quote: a second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy

subject: Wand of Disintegration
fact: The second Mezzaloth pressed the wand against the Wall of Force.
source_quote: It pressed the wand against the Wall of Force

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: One of the Apprentice Arcanaloths unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party.
source_quote: one of the Apprentice Arcanaloths unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party

subject: Wall of Force destruction
fact: The barrier that had protected the party for five brutal rounds simply ceased to exist.
source_quote: the barrier that had protected the party for five brutal rounds simply ceased to exist

subject: Teleportation
fact: The party seized their moment and teleported away.
source_quote: The party seized their moment and teleported away

subject: Sporedome
fact: They materialized in Sporedome.
source_quote: They materialized in Sporedome

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak rushed out to greet the party.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet them

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet the party.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet them

subject: Brandyr
fact: Drow assistants carefully took custody of Brandyr, the captured Fire Giant.
source_quote: Drow assistants carefully took custody of Brandyr, the captured Fire Giant

subject: nearby chamber
fact: Brandyr was moved to a nearby chamber to begin the ritual.
source_quote: moved the enormous creature to a nearby chamber to begin the ritual

subject: Ritual duration
fact: Solom explained that the process would take ten days to complete.
source_quote: explained that the process would take ten days to complete

subject: Drow
fact: The party was given the option to return to Hillsfar.
source_quote: given the option to return to Hillsfar

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Solom assured the party he would remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas refined her archery instincts, sharpening her ability to fire through cover.
source_quote: Akritas refined her archery instincts, sharpening her ability to fire through cover

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim deepened his divine connection, gaining a steadier hand for maintaining his sacred wards.
source_quote: Bramgrim deepened his divine connection, gaining a steadier hand for maintaining his sacred wards

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim added a new radiant prayer to his arsenal.
source_quote: adding a new radiant prayer to his arsenal

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mused aloud about engineering a device that could reshape the very nature of his elemental attacks.
source_quote: Felkur mused aloud about engineering a device that could reshape the very nature of his elemental attacks

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur asked if he could sell the merchandise now that he is a figure of legend.
source_quote: he had only one question: could he sell the merchandise?

subject: Wand of Disintegration
fact: The wand was crackling with disintegrating energy.
source_quote: wand crackling with disintegrating energy

subject: Fire Giant
fact: The Fire Giants were furious at the party's perceived insults to their master.
source_quote: furious at the party's perceived insults to their master

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur casually dismissed the GM's difficulty in landing hits on the party.
source_quote: It's just a skill issue

subject: Daein
fact: Daein marveled at the symmetry of the party once again defying the odds.
source_quote: This reminds me of the battle that we should have lost at the start of the campaign

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: Akritas fired her Oathbow at the Shield Guardian, dealing steady damage.
source_quote: Akritas fires her Oathbow at the Shield Guardian, dealing steady damage

subject: Oathbow
fact: Akritas used her Oathbow against the Shield Guardian.
source_quote: Akritas fires her Oathbow at the Shield Guardian

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim used his second wind to recover from his wounds.
source_quote: Daein uses his second wind to recover from his wounds

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used his second wind to recover from his wounds.
source_quote: Daein uses his second wind to recover from his wounds

subject: Trident
fact: The Mezzaloth used a trident to harass the party.
source_quote: The cruel Yugoloth lashed out at Daein with its trident

subject: Cloudkill
fact: The Mezzaloth cast Cloudkill which filled the area with poisonous yellow-green fog.
source_quote: A Mezzaloth attempts to break the party's concentration on their spells but fails to hit Daein with its trident

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spirit Guardians which damaged the Mezzaloth before his concentration was broken.
source_quote: Bramgrim's protective spirits to dissolve into nothing

subject: Wall of Force
fact: The party held their ground behind the Wall of Force for five rounds.
source_quote: The party holds their ground against a Mezzaloth and encroaching reinforcements while waiting for their escape window

subject: Dispel Magic
fact: The Mezzaloth attempted to dispel the Wall of Force but failed.
source_quote: The Mezzaloth attempts to dispel the Wall of Force but fails

subject: Spiritual Weapon
fact: Bramgrim summoned a Spiritual Weapon as a bonus action.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons a spiritual weapon as a bonus action

subject: Fireball
fact: An Apprentice Arcanaloth unleashed a Fireball that engulfed the entire party.
source_quote: An Apprentice Arcanaloth unleashes a fireball that engulfs the entire party

subject: Word of Radiance
fact: Bramgrim gained the Word of Radiance cantrip upon leveling up.
source_quote: Bramgrim gaining advantage on concentration checks and the Word of Radiance cantrip

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is inhabited by Drow and serves as a base for Solom Ned'razak's magical research.
source_quote: It is inhabited by Drow and serves as a base for Solom Ned'razak's magical research

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr was handed over to Solom Ned'razak's Drow assistants for experimentation and blood-borne rituals.
source_quote: Brandyr for Solom's experimentation

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a Drow Alchemist who greets the party.
source_quote: A Drow Alchemist who greets the party alongside Solom Ned'razak

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is a Drow Archmage who receives the party.
source_quote: A Drow Archmage who receives the party upon their return to Sporedome

subject: Drow assistants
fact: Drow assistants took custody of the captured Fire Giant.
source_quote: Drow assistants carefully took custody of Brandyr

subject: Fire Giants
fact: Two Fire Giants scaled the wall and joined the fray.
source_quote: Two Fire Giants scale the wall and join the fray

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloths
fact: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths began shouting for reinforcements.
source_quote: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths emerge and begin shouting for reinforcements

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was caught in the poisonous cloud and took damage.
source_quote: The party's sidekick who was caught in the poisonous cloud and took damage

subject: Leveling up
fact: The party leveled up after their successful escape.
source_quote: Following their successful escape, the party levels up

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur is now technically a figure of legend known as a phantom thief.
source_quote: Felkur was now, technically, a figure of legend — a phantom thief no one could name

subject: Merchandise joke
fact: The group joked about the possibility of selling merchandise to recover lost funds.
source_quote: the possibility of selling merchandise to recover lost funds
